caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I CN NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone in a room decorated with framed photos and clothing racks. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and various garments hang on racks. A small logo with the text "SIDE" is visible in the bottom left corner of each scene, and a red and white logo containing the word "FLY" is in the bottom right. As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, moving it from an open position toward his chest. His facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing while he maintains a focused gaze off-camera. The camera angle and setting remain constant throughout the clip.
